title.en: China-to-Angola Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入安哥拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入安哥拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Angola IANORQ conformity and standards practice, IRSEA electricity licensing, ENDE grid-connection review, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interconnection, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, and EPC/lender specifications for financed solar projects — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与安哥拉IANORQ合格评定和标准实践、IRSEA电力许可、ENDE并网审查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互连、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数及融资太阳能项目EPC/贷款方规格——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與安哥拉IANORQ合格評定和標準實務、IRSEA電力許可、ENDE併網審查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互連、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數及融資太陽能項目EPC/貸款方規格——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IANORQ conformity determination, IRSEA licence approval, ENDE grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, EPC contractors, developers, and installers should verify current Angolan standards adoption, conformity/import controls, electricity licensing, ENDE/RNT connection conditions, Portuguese-language technical documentation, and project-owner or lender specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IANORQ合格评定裁定、IRSEA许可批准、ENDE并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、EPC承包商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验安哥拉现行标准采纳、合格评定/进口管制、电力许可、ENDE/RNT接入条件、葡萄牙语技术文件以及项目业主或贷款方规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IANORQ合格評定裁定、IRSEA許可批准、ENDE併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、EPC承包商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗安哥拉現行標準採納、合格評定/進口管制、電力許可、ENDE/RNT接入條件、葡萄牙語技術文件以及項目業主或貸款方規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Angola, the key practical gaps are: (1) IANORQ conformity and import-facing standards checks, often using IEC-referenced evidence rather than China-only certificates; (2) IRSEA electricity-sector licensing and project authorization where the project or operator requires regulatory approval; (3) ENDE distribution connection or RNT transmission interface review for grid-tied projects; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interconnection, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) Portuguese-language documentation and firmware validation for Angola's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful background but is not automatically accepted by IANORQ, IRSEA, ENDE, EPC contractors, or lenders without supplementary IEC-referenced testing and project approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口安哥拉时，主要实际差距包括：（1）IANORQ合格评定和进口环节标准核查，通常需要IEC引用证据，而非仅中国证书；（2）项目或运营方需要监管批准时的IRSEA电力行业许可和项目授权；（3）并网项目的ENDE配电接入或RNT输电接口审查；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互连以及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）葡萄牙语文件及针对安哥拉50 Hz、220/380 V电网的固件验证。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景材料，但若无补充IEC引用测试和项目审批，不能被视为IANORQ、IRSEA、ENDE、EPC承包商或贷款方自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口安哥拉時，主要實際差距包括：（1）IANORQ合格評定和進口環節標準核查，通常需要IEC引用證據，而非僅中國證書；（2）項目或營運方需要監管批准時的IRSEA電力行業許可和項目授權；（3）併網項目的ENDE配電接入或RNT輸電接口審查；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互連以及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）葡萄牙語文件及針對安哥拉50 Hz、220/380 V電網的韌體驗證。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景材料，但若無補充IEC引用測試和項目審批，不能被視為IANORQ、IRSEA、ENDE、EPC承包商或貸款方自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
